hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built by Owners
Not Strangers
hero.subheadline: Owner Tom Gilbert personally oversees every project with in-house crews who never rotate. With 26+ years of experience and voted Best Pool Builder every year since 2014, East Coast Pools & Spas delivers custom pools that exceed expectations across Ormond Beach and East Central Florida.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Building &<br class="hidden md:block"> Care for East Central Florida
services.subtitle: From custom gunite construction to monthly maintenance, East Coast Pools & Spas handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can focus on enjoying your backyard paradise.

cards.title: Custom Gunite Pools
cards.description: Fully custom-designed gunite swimming pools built by our in-house crews. Every pool is tailored to your backyard, budget, and lifestyle with award-winning craftsmanship.

cards.title: Fiberglass Pool Installation
cards.description: Professional fiberglass pool installations offering a durable, low-maintenance alternative with faster build times and a smooth, stain-resistant finish.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Complete pool renovation including PebbleTec resurfacing, new tile, equipment upgrades, and modern redesigns that breathe new life into aging pools.

cards.title: Monthly Pool Service
cards.description: Ongoing maintenance plans that keep your pool crystal clear, chemically balanced, and equipment running at peak performance year-round.

cards.title: Water & Fire Features
cards.description: Custom waterfalls, scuppers, bubblers, and fire bowls that transform your pool into a stunning backyard centerpiece with dramatic visual impact.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Enclosures
cards.description: Custom summer kitchens and screened pool enclosures designed to complete your outdoor living space for year-round Florida entertaining.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Splash in Three Steps

steps.title: Free Design Consultation
steps.description: Tom meets you at your home to discuss your vision, assess your yard, and provide a detailed proposal. No pressure, no obligation — just honest expert guidance from the owner himself.

steps.title: In-House Crews Build Your Pool
steps.description: Our dedicated construction team — not rotating subcontractors — brings your design to life. Tom personally oversees every phase from excavation through final plaster.

steps.title: Dive Into Your Dream Pool
steps.description: Your custom pool is complete, inspected, and swim-ready. Plus, our service team is here for ongoing maintenance so your pool stays perfect for years to come.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: Built by the Owner, Not a Sales Team
about.description: East Coast Pools & Spas is a family business founded by Tom Gilbert, a native of Ormond Beach. With over 26 years of hands-on experience from filling chlorine jugs to earning his contractor's license, Tom personally oversees every project. Our in-house crews build your pool — no rotating subcontractors, no project managers standing between you and the person responsible for your pool.

features.title: Owner On Every Job Site
features.description: Tom Gilbert personally supervises every project from design through completion. You deal directly with the owner, not a middleman or sales rep.

features.title: In-House Crews, Never Subcontractors
features.description: Our dedicated construction team works exclusively for us. That means consistent quality, clear communication, and true accountability on every build.

features.title: Best Pool Builder Every Year Since 2014
features.description: Voted Daytona Beach News Journal Reader's Choice Best Pool & Spa Builder consecutively for over a decade, plus multiple FSPA Design Awards.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written proposal. We walk you through every cost upfront — no hidden fees, no change-order surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build and every service we perform. If anything is not up to your expectations, Tom will personally make it right. Our decade-long streak as Best Pool Builder is not just an award — it is a promise we make to every homeowner we work with.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom gunite pools take 8-12 weeks from permit to completion, depending on design complexity and permitting timelines. Fiberglass installations are faster at 3-5 weeks. Tom will give you a realistic timeline during your consultation.

faqs.question: Do you handle all the permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle every permit, every inspection, and all coordination with local building departments in Volusia and Flagler Counties. You do not have to deal with any paperwork — we take care of everything from start to finish.

faqs.question: What makes in-house crews better than subcontractors?
faqs.answer: Our crews work exclusively for East Coast Pools and know our quality standards inside out. With subcontractors, you get different workers on every job with varying quality. Our team is consistent, accountable, and takes pride in every pool they build.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several financing partners to offer competitive rates and flexible payment plans. During your consultation, we can discuss options that fit your budget and get you pre-qualified quickly.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Ormond Beach, Daytona Beach, Port Orange, New Smyrna Beach, Palm Coast, Flagler Beach, St. Augustine, and surrounding communities throughout Volusia and Flagler Counties in East Central Florida.

testimonials.name: Jim & Patricia H.
testimonials.text: Tom and his team were incredible from start to finish. They built our dream pool on time and on budget. The attention to detail was outstanding and the in-house crew made us feel comfortable every step of the way.

testimonials.name: Mark D.
testimonials.text: We interviewed several pool builders and East Coast Pools was the clear choice. Tom's hands-on approach and years of experience really showed. Our pool turned out even better than we imagined.

testimonials.name: Sandra W.
testimonials.text: East Coast Pools remodeled our 15-year-old pool and it looks brand new. The PebbleTec finish is beautiful and the new water features are stunning. Highly recommend this company.
